title: DNSarchitecturedocument
content:
# DNSarchitecture ## CoreDNScluster
- ：CoreDNS 1.11.1
- deployment：3Pod， cn-east-node-01, cn-east-node-02, cn-east-node-03
- ：Pod 512MBmemory，1CPU
- cacheconfiguration：max_ttl=600s, min_ttl=30s, cache_size=10000 ## - ：10.0.1.53
- ：114.114.114.114
- strategy：，timeout3seconds ## standards
- ：.internal.corp
- ArecordTTLstandard：300seconds
- SRVrecordTTLstandard：60seconds
- database：db-master.internal.corp → 146.8.253.220
- message queue：mq-broker.internal.corp → 10.0.5.200IP，2026-03-20migration
- API：api.internal.corp → 146.8.253.100, 146.8.253.101 ## alertthreshold
- DNS QPS > 2000 alert
- latencyP99 > 100ms alert
- cache < 60% alert
- CoreDNS Podmemory > 80% alert
author: networkArchitecture Team
